title: Automation that auto-populate the People column when a specific column is changed
excerpt:
Automation: 
When People1 column is assigned, then fill People2 column by the one who changed People1. 
  
This automation may work if only the someone is dynamic to the one who triggered the change on People1.

posts.author: ncortez (Neri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Automation:

When People1 column is assigned, then fill People2 column by the one who changed People1.

image891×331 13.5 KB
